title: Get extra settings of columns
excerpt:
I need to load data from monday. One of the stages I get column types. But I also need other properties. 
How do I get additional settings of columns: default value, readonly, etc?

posts.author: o.zhdan (o.zhdan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to load data from monday. One of the stages I get column types. But I also need other properties.
How do I get additional settings of columns: default value, readonly, etc?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @o.zhdan!

All the information you can retrieve from the board’s columns is here:

You can’t get default values or the permissions settings of the columns via API as of today.

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
-Matias
